T0001.title: Order Reporting
T0001.definition: The act of reporting an illicit operation or transaction to an internal manager or coordinator within a fraud ring for settlement, task assignment, or performance tracking.
T0001.description: The act of reporting an illicit operation or transaction to an internal manager or coordinator within a fraud ring for settlement, task assignment, or performance tracking.
